# Project Name : B_BREAKER (PAYLOAD)
# Version      : 0.30
# Date         : 2026-04-29
# Target Slot  : 10
# Developers   : yas & Gemini
#
# [Change History]
# V0.30 - CENTER OVER TEXT: Mapped Slot ID to 10. Changed Y-coordinate for "OVER" text in Slot 43 (OVR_DRW1) from 0x2D to 0x20 for exact vertical centering on cleared screen.
# V0.29 - GAME OVER TEXT FIX: Mapped Slot ID to 09. Corrected DRAW CHAR variable pointers from literal coordinates to variable IDs (0x30-0x33). "OVER" is now perfectly centered horizontally.
# V0.28 - INPUT-BASED GAME OVER: Mapped Slot ID to 08. Resolved VM crashes by strictly following the instruction set. Implemented "OVER" display with an input-wait loop.
# V0.27 - SAFE GAME OVER: (Failed) Exited to OS menu.
